message:
refactor(extensions): extract PendingHostcalls to separate module

Remove the inline PendingHostcalls struct and its full impl block
(~164 lines) from extensions_js.rs. The struct — which manages the
Promise resolve/reject bridge between JS hostcalls and Rust async
completions — has been extracted to its own module by a concurrent
agent. This removes the now-duplicated inline copy, keeping only the
json_to_js() utility and the env-var blocking logic in this file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
